zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan於1198年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn44歲，母親Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd-1歲。她於大約1222年與Llewelyn ap Cynfrig在威爾士丹比爾爾 根結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1277年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan于1198年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn44岁，母亲Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd-1岁。她于大约1222年与Llewelyn ap Cynfrig在威尔士丹比爾爾 根结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1277年在她的家乡享年79岁。

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan was born in 1198, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn, was 44 and her mother, Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd, was -1. She married Llewelyn ap Cynfrig about 1222, in Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1277, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan est née en 1198, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd, avait -1 ans. Elle a épousé Llewelyn ap Cynfrig environ 1222, à Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1277, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan è nata il nel 1198 nel Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd, aveva -1 anni. Lei sposato Llewelyn ap Cynfrig circa 1222, nel Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1277, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorganが1198年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfynは44歳，母Nest verch Einion of Senghenyddは-1歳であった。約1222年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブウルチ グウインでLlewelyn ap Cynfrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1277年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan(이)가 1198년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd(은)는 -1세였다. 그녀는 대략 1222년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 브w치 그w이에서 Llewelyn ap Cynfrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan nasceu em 1198, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd, tinha -1 anos. Ela casou-se com Llewelyn ap Cynfrig aproximadamente 1222, em Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1277, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan родилась в 1198 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Cynfyn Fychan Ap Cynfyn было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Einion of Senghenydd, -1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llewelyn ap Cynfrig около 1222 г. в местности бвлч гвин, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1277 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
